name: cloud-travel-guide
description: A travel guide application built with Next.js and Electron

scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:build:main && concurrently -k -n next,main,electron -c blue,yellow,magenta "cross-env BROWSER=none next dev --webpack -p 3000" "node electron/esbuild.mjs --watch" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_NO_SANDBOX=1 electron build/electron/main.js --no-sandbox"
scripts.electron:build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run electron:build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=true next build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.electron:preview: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run electron:build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILD=true next build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron build/electron/main.js --no-sandbox
